overview: Smart Attendance Management System with multi-company support (Deepam Engineering Works and Deepam Traders). Features face recognition for worker login, geo-restriction, attendance tracking with delay/early leave/overtime calculations, AI assistant, PDF reports, and now real-time multi-device sync backed by the Internet Computer canister.
features: Worker biometric face recognition enrollment and login
Geo-restriction — camera only activates within company range
Attendance tracking with delay, early leave, and overtime calculations
Real-time multi-device sync via backend canister (5s polling)
Company location persisted to backend — works in mobile APK
PDF attendance reports (weekly, monthly, yearly, per-worker)
Offline AI assistant for attendance queries
Company timing settings (start/end time, grace period)
